seo.siteDescription: Browser editor for creating, printing, and exporting foldable A4 fanzines.
seo.appDescription: Browser editor for designing the eight panels of a foldable A4 fanzine and exporting a print-ready PDF.

seo.title: Create and export an A4 fanzine
seo.socialTitle: Fanzines | Create and export an A4 fanzine
seo.description: Fanzines is an editor for assembling a foldable publication on one A4 sheet, adding text and images, and exporting it as a PDF.
seo.socialDescription: A simple editor for designing, previewing, printing, and folding your own fanzine.
seo.imageAlt: Foldable fanzine and editing tools in Fanzines

hero.description: Fanzines gives you an editor for placing text and images on a foldable A4 sheet. Design each panel, review the full sheet, and export a print-ready PDF.
hero.handAlt: Small fanzine opened in a hand

definition.title: A4 editor
definition.description: Start with a blank cover and work panel by panel. The editor places each page in the correct sheet order, with cut and fold guides so you do not have to calculate it.
definition.tableAlt: Work table with printed photos, utility knife, ruler, and scissors
definition.caption: Design on screen. Finish with paper, scissors, and a table.

making.title: From editor to paper
making.description: The PDF is imposed for one A4 sheet. Print, cut the center line, and fold.
making.foldGuideAlt: Hand-drawn instructions for folding, cutting, and opening a fanzine

layout.title: Set up the sheet
layout.text: The editor orders the eight faces on a landscape A4 sheet, ready to print.

content.title: Add text and images
content.text: Upload photos or write directly on each panel. You can move, rotate, and adjust every piece.

export.title: Export and fold
export.text: Download the PDF, print, cut along the center guide, and turn the sheet into a fanzine.

finalCta.title: Start with a cover and an image.

seo.title: A4 fanzine editor
seo.description: Design an eight-panel fanzine in the browser, review the A4 sheet, and export a PDF ready to print and fold.
seo.imageAlt: Fanzines editor with A4 sheet and fanzine panels

editorShell.title: Fanzine editor
editorShell.confirmReset: Reset the fanzine and delete all elements?

toasts.overflowDescription: Skipped {count} {fileLabel} because there were no pages available.
toasts.largeImageDescriptionSingle: The image is large; if you notice slowness, use a reduced version.
toasts.largeImageDescriptionMultiple: {count} images are large; if you notice slowness, use reduced versions.

inspector.title: Properties
inspector.empty: Select text or an image to edit its size, position, and style.

exportPanel.title: Export
exportPanel.description: Landscape A4 PDF, ready to print, cut, and fold.
exportPanel.error: The PDF could not be generated. Check the uploaded images and try again.

sheetPreview.alt: A4 sheet preview of the fanzine
sheetPreview.renderError: The preview could not be generated.

zineStore.browserOnly: Image uploads are only available in the browser.
zineStore.invalidImage: The selected file does not look like a compatible image.
zineStore.imageLoadError: The selected image could not be loaded.
zineStore.optimizedImageLoadError: The optimized image could not be loaded.
zineStore.imageOptimizeError: The image could not be optimized.
zineStore.largeImageWarning: The image is large; if you notice slowness, use a reduced version.
zineStore.noPage: No pages are available for this image.
zineStore.fileLoadError: This file could not be loaded.
zineStore.genericFileLoadError: A file could not be loaded.
zineStore.overflowWarning: Some images were skipped because there were no pages available.
